title: APGI Framework: Adaptive Predictive Global Integration for Consciousness Research (v0.2.0)
description: Companion code and synthetic seed datasets for the APGI paper series (Papers 1–3). Implements core APGI equations (Sₜ, θₜ, Πⁱ_eff), a Liquid Neural Network extension (Paper 2), a five-level hierarchical architecture (Paper 3), parameter recovery, clinical DoC interpretation, and all figure-generation scripts. Includes six pre-generated synthetic datasets (sim1–sim6) covering ignition dynamics, parameter recovery, LNN reservoir trajectories, hierarchical prediction-error series, disorder-of-consciousness biomarkers, and LNN bifurcation signatures.
notes: To reproduce all figures: bash reproduce_all.sh. To regenerate seed datasets: python data/generate_seeds.py. All simulations use MASTER_SEED=2025. Replace ORCID, arXiv ID, and OSF URL placeholders before final deposit.
